name: SimWoods Golf Society
about: SimWoods Golf Society is an unattended private indoor golf simulator facility offering 24/7 access to premium golf simulation technology. The venue features state-of-the-art Uneekor EYEXO2 Launch Monitor and Swing Optix system, providing a realistic golf experience with high-speed cameras and accurate data tracking. It operates on a self-service model where customers book bays online and have exclusive use of the space during their reservation. The facility includes a 4-hole putting green, café lounge with refreshments, poker table, and TV lounge, catering to both individual practice and group events up to 5.5 hours.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 self-service access with no bay availability concerns
Premium Uneekor EYEXO2 technology with GSPRO software for realistic simulation
Flexible booking system with real-time pricing and last-minute availability
Exclusive after-hours access for Players Pass members
Comprehensive facility including putting green and comfortable lounge areas

food_and_drink.notes: Café lounge available with coffee, tea, snacks, and beverages; customers can order delivery during their session
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with Swing Optix system, featuring high-speed cameras and multiple hitting zones

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs. The facility provides complimentary rental sets if needed, but recommends bringing a spare set of shoes to prevent debris from entering the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: You can order delivery during your session. The facility has a café lounge with coffee, tea, snacks, and beverages available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Groups can play for up to 5.5 hours per session, with flexibility to enjoy a full round of golf and order delivery during that time.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility accommodates golfers of all skill levels and can host group gatherings including birthday parties, but specific kid-friendly features or age restrictions are not detailed.
